source: WebSearch aggregation (realmadrid.com, Yahoo Sports, classementlaliga.com, Bolavip)

key_insights.title_race: Barcelona leads by 11 pts (88 vs 77). Mathematically not sealed but effectively won.
key_insights.ucl_zone: Pos 1-4: Barcelona (88), Real Madrid (77), Villarreal (68), Atlético (63). Gap 4th-5th = 10 pts.
key_insights.relegation: Sevilla (34), Levante, Oviedo in bottom 3. Alavés (36) just above cutoff.
key_insights.mid_table_cluster: Positions 12-17 separated by just 3 pts (36-39). 6 teams in danger zone proximity.
key_insights.pichichi: Lewandowski (24) vs Mbappé (23). Tight race for final weeks.

jornada_34_insights.villarreal_5_1_levante: Villarreal consolidates 3rd. Levante hammered — relegation confirmed?
jornada_34_insights.osasuna_1_2_barcelona: Barcelona continues winning even away. Title cruise.
jornada_34_insights.espanyol_0_2_real_madrid: Madrid keeps pace but gap too large for title.
jornada_34_insights.alaves_2_4_athletic: Athletic with statement away win. Alavés in trouble.
jornada_34_insights.getafe_0_2_rayo: Derby. Rayo wins away. Both safe mid-table.
jornada_34_insights.valencia_0_2_atletico: Atlético clinical away. Valencia stays in danger zone.
